_comment: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only. Mimics a USPTO-style patent record listing.
query: perovskite solar OR mof carbon capture

results.title: FIXTURE: Method for halide perovskite solar cell encapsulation
results.abstract: Synthetic patent abstract for hexa-matter Phase F selftest. Describes an encapsulation process for halide perovskite solar cells claiming 25-year lifetime (UNVERIFIED).

results.title: FIXTURE: Metal-organic framework composition for direct air capture
results.abstract: Synthetic patent abstract. Describes a MOF composition for direct air capture at $100/t CO2 (UNPROVEN; Climeworks amine baseline $600-1000/t).

results.title: FIXTURE: Single-crystal turbine blade casting process for Ni-based superalloy
results.abstract: Synthetic patent abstract. Describes a Bridgman-process variant for Ni-based superalloy single-crystal turbine blade casting.
